title: No Leaf Litter
body:
### A resource pack that transforms the **distracting** leaf litter into a transparent appearance

# Purpose
clear away the leaf litter from the ground for an **unobstructed** view while you enjoy your time playing!

### With Out 
![With Out](https://i.postimg.cc/4xSQ5rQk/2025-06-16-02-57-04.png)

### With!
![With](https://i.postimg.cc/Pf0LSTBM/2025-06-16-02-57-26.png)

If you encounter any issues, please reach out to me on my Discord ( zya4d )
